narrative:
Oxford 13 (precinct in Butler County) has 696 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.6 percentage points.
